name: jp.hidano.vtuber-system-base.character-selection-tab
description: Display 1 UI tab for the VTuberSystemBase that maps MoCap actor slots to avatars and exposes per-avatar settings via the RealtimeAvatarController. Provides the Contracts assembly (IPC topic constants and payload DTOs) shared between the UI side and the main-output-side RAC adapter, plus the UI implementation that consumes the ui-toolkit-shell facades. The main-output-side adapter (RAC driving) is out of scope for this package.
